name: Sanjith G
notes: Non-record submission. Pipeline confirmed on Kaggle T4. Awaiting H100 compute grant for final scored run.
approach: 5-layer joint optimization system. Unique contribution: compression-aware training via per-row weight range penalty and QAT, treating the 16MB budget as a first-class training objective during gradient updates.

layers.L3_COMPRESS: Weight range penalty + QAT final 500 steps
layers.L5_ADAPT: Low-rank Q/V regularization for TTT readiness
